content:
May the coordinator see *you*—not just a file, not just a name—  
but the light that has endured the storm. And if the forgotten thought still hides,  
perhaps it will return in that quiet hour after,  
when the dust of hope has settled into form. Would you like me to help you center or prepare before the meeting? A visualization, a grounding phrase, or even a little talisman of thought to carry with you?
